reference.comment: trust_remote_code: GraniteSpeechNarConfig + GraniteSpeechNarForASR + GraniteSpeechNarProjector + GraniteSpeechNarCTCEncoder + Conformer blocks live in modeling_granite_speech_nar.py at the pinned revision. The dumper mirrors the model card README path (AutoProcessor + AutoModel + model.transcribe). attn_implementation=eager on CPU (no flash-attn on Apple); the NAR LM uses create_bidirectional_mask() natively, so no mask-helper patching is needed.

tokenizer_summary.comment: Two tokenizers: a char-level CTC tokenizer (vocab 348) over the encoder.out head, and the granite-4 BPE tokenizer (vocab 100352, no audio_token_index) over the LLM input/output.
